---
title: "Lecture 10"
subtitle: ENVX2001 Applied Statistical Methods
date: last-modified
date-format: "MMM YYYY"
format: html
---

**Lecture 10 -- Principal component analysis**

## Part A

{{< pdf Lecture-10a.pdf width="100%" height="600" button="Download PDF" >}}

## Part B

{{< pdf Lecture-10b.pdf width="100%" height="600" button="Download PDF" >}}
